message:
Fix OCSF Base Event mapping for Zeek logs (#128)

* Fix mapping to OCSF Base Event

* Add example that maps to Base Event

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,34 @@
+---
+description: |
+  Maps a Zeek log to OCSF Base Event.
+---
+
+// --- Preamble ---------------------------------
+
+this = { zeek: this }
+
+zeek::ocsf::map_common
+
+// --- OCSF: classification attributes ----------
+
+ocsf.activity_id = 0
+ocsf.class_uid = 0
+ocsf.category_uid = 0
+ocsf.severity_id = 1
+ocsf.type_uid = 0
+
+// --- OCSF: context attributes -----------------
+
+if zeek._path? != null {
+  ocsf.metadata.log_name = move zeek._path
+}
+
+// --- OCSF: primary attributes -----------------
+
+ocsf.status_id = 0
+
+// --- Epiloge ----------------------------------
+
+this = {...ocsf, unmapped: zeek}
+@name = "ocsf.base_event"
+ocsf::derive

@@ -0,0 +1,40 @@
+{
+  activity_id: 0,
+  activity_name: "Unknown",
+  category_name: "Uncategorized",
+  category_uid: 0,
+  class_name: "Base Event",
+  class_uid: 0,
+  metadata: {
+    logged_time: null,
+    product: {
+      cpe_name: "cpe:2.3:a:zeek:zeek",
+      name: "Zeek",
+      vendor_name: "Zeek",
+    },
+    uid: "Cqp7rtziLijlnrxYf",
+    version: "1.6.0",
+  },
+  severity: "Informational",
+  severity_id: 1,
+  status: "Unknown",
+  status_id: 0,
+  time: 2021-11-17T13:54:01.721755136Z,
+  type_name: "Base Event: Unknown",
+  type_uid: 0,
+  unmapped: {
+    id: {
+      orig_h: 87.251.64.137,
+      orig_p: 64078,
+      resp_h: 198.71.247.91,
+      resp_p: 80,
+      vlan: null,
+      vlan_inner: null,
+    },
+    name: "bad_HTTP_request",
+    addl: null,
+    notice: false,
+    peer: "zeek",
+    source: "HTTP",
+  },
+}
